message:
feat(tests): add 10 tower bridge contract tests, update architecture doc to v1.4 (asupersync-2oh2u.7.5)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@

 **Date**: 2026-03-03
-**Version**: 1.2.0
+**Version**: 1.4.0
 **Dependencies**: T7.1 (interop target ranking)
 **Purpose**: Define the adapter architecture that preserves Asupersync invariants
 (no ambient authority, structured concurrency, cancellation protocol) while
@@ -404,6 +404,7 @@ asupersync/
 │       ├── io.rs                 # TokioIo / AsupersyncIo adapters
 │       ├── cancel.rs             # CancelAware wrapper
 │       ├── hyper_bridge.rs       # hyper v1 server/client bridge
+│       ├── tower_bridge.rs       # tower::Service bidirectional adapters
 │       ├── axum_serve.rs         # axum::serve() replacement
 │       ├── sqlx_runtime.rs       # sqlx Runtime trait impl
 │       └── tonic_transport.rs    # tonic transport bridge

   - `asupersync-tokio-compat/src/timer.rs`
   - `asupersync-tokio-compat/src/io.rs`
   - `asupersync-tokio-compat/src/cancel.rs`
+  - `asupersync-tokio-compat/src/tower_bridge.rs`
 - Contract test for this document: `tests/tokio_adapter_boundary_architecture.rs`

@@ -570,6 +572,7 @@ rch exec -- cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
 
 | Date | Author | Change |
 |------|--------|--------|
+| 2026-03-04 | SapphireHill | T7.5: Added `tower_bridge` module — bidirectional `FromTower`/`IntoTower` adapters preserving INV-1..5, `BridgeError` type, 9 tests (v1.4) |
 | 2026-03-03 | SapphireHill | T7.6: Implemented safe blocking bridge (`block_on_sync`, `block_with_cx`, `with_cx_sync`) with Cx context propagation, 3 cancellation modes, panic capture as `BlockingOutcome`, 19 tests — INV-1..5 preserved (v1.3) |
 | 2026-03-03 | SapphireHill | T7.4: Implemented runtime adapter primitives — I/O trait bridging (TokioIo/AsupersyncIo), hyper v1 Read/Write, timer with waker registration, executor with spawn_fn (v1.2) |
 | 2026-03-03 | WhiteDesert | Added boundary outcome contract matrix, structured log/replay artifact policy, validation bundle, and evidence linkage (v1.1) |
